meaning: adj.用铅版印刷的,套用老调的
examples: He was stereotyped by some as a renegade.
Why are professors stereotyped as absent-minded?
Children from certain backgrounds tend to be stereotyped by their teachers.
And every group of people -- including moms -- gets caricatured and stereotyped on TV.
They are stereotyped as wanting big cars, lots of money and all kinds of fame.
